name: prototype-daily-service
description: Cloud-native daily service powered by Claude Code cron jobs

scripts.test: node --test tests/build.test.js tests/data-schema.test.js tests/server/router.test.js tests/server/integration.test.js tests/server/middleware/auth.test.js tests/server/middleware/cors.test.js tests/server/middleware/logger.test.js tests/server/middleware/rate-limit.test.js tests/server/utils/response.test.js tests/server/utils/validation.test.js tests/server/utils/api-keys.test.js tests/server/utils/usage-tracker.test.js tests/video-llm/router.test.js tests/video-llm/adapters.test.js tests/video-llm/adapters-impl.test.js tests/video-llm/index.test.js tests/video-llm/config.test.js tests/client/sdk.test.js
scripts.evaluate:all: npm run evaluate && npm run evaluate:structural
